# LineStyle

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="LineStyle icon">

<div class="dioxus-icons-widget" data-icon-name="LineStyle" data-svg="&lt;svg xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot; width=&quot;24&quot; height=&quot;24&quot; viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; class="a-s">&quot;#000000&quot;</span><span class="a-p">,</span><span> </span><span class="a-pr">stroke_width</span><span class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-co">2</span><span> data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Tags
line, stroke, style, dashed, border

## Categories
design, tools

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/line-style)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::LineStyle;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        LineStyle { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
